_doc: Verified change centers: where each project is ACTUALLY changing, computed by scripts/find_change_center.py (wide-frame differencing, cloud-masked) and confirmed visually on rendered frames. Time-lapses and analytics aim here, not at site centroids.

green_paradise.how: visual before/after (offshore diked fill, SE of Can Thanh; earlier wide-diff hit at 10.4272,106.8629 was a tidal-mudflat artifact)

golden_avenue.how: wide-diff score 34.5 + visual (bare land 2023 -> built shophouse grids 2026, NE toward Bac Luan II)

vinhomes_imperia.how: wide-diff (active parcel NE of mature core)

funan_techo.how: wide-diff score 67.2 + dry-season visual (new straight earthwork cut near the Mekong bank, absent 12/2024; Section I works are mostly channel widening, so visible change is modest)

_stability_sites.note: grand_park, ocean_park_1, ocean_park_2, the_minato render at their centroids on purpose: the projects are substantially complete, so the honest time-lapse is township stability plus infill. Wide-diff candidates nearby (e.g. the new ring-road bridge north of Grand Park) were rejected as unrelated infrastructure.
